Verified Petition For: 1. Compelling Current Trustees To Turn Over Documents And Information; 2. Suspension Of Respondents As Co-Trustees; 3. Removal Of Respondents As Co-Trustees; 4. Compel Distribution; 5. Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; 6. Breach Of Trust; 7. Surcharging Respondents Valerie Ann Mcgee, Linda Marie Dawson, And Bababra Ann Mcgee For Fair Rental Value Of Trust'S Real Properties They Solely Occupy; And 8. Instructions To Respondents
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Continued To Feb-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Greg Aslanian appeared via zoom for Charles Williams (petitioner) .
Lucas Pastuszka appeared via zoom for and with Valerie Mcgee in person (objector)

Discussion was held regarding the real properties, that the daughters are occupying the trust properties, that they need more time to relocate and find the proper housing. Ms. McGee has been using her own funds to pay for the trust matters.

Mr. Aslanian stated his position if no movement occurs when they come back for the next hearing, that he like the co-trustees to be suspended, and that they would like to place a professional fiduciary to take over the duties.

The matter is continued to February 2, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.


Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Robles. Not reported.

Verified Petition For: 1. Compelling Current Trustees To Turn Over Documents And Information; 2. Suspension Of Respondents As Co-Trustees; 3. Removal Of Respondents As Co-Trustees; 4. Compel Distribution; 5. Breach Of Fiduciary Duty; 6. Breach Of Trust; 7. Surcharging Respondents Valerie Ann Mcgee, Linda Marie Dawson, And Bababra Ann Mcgee For Fair Rental Value Of Trust'S Real Properties They Solely Occupy; And 8. Instructions To Respondents
Off Calendar Jul-07-2025 Continued To Nov-03-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Greg Aslanian appeared via zoom for Charles Williams (petitioner) .
Lucas Pastuszka appeared via zoom for and with Valerie Mcgee in person (objector).

Mr. Aslanian that additional information is required, that parties need to meet and confer involving the sale the real estate property, and that beneficiaries will have to vacate the property.

Mr. Pastuszka stated that Valerie is having a hard time finding another place to rent, that the daughter Barbara wants to purchase the property located in Vacaville.

The matter is continued to November 3, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
